allow: Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command '$p = $PROFILE.CurrentUserAllHosts; Write-Host ""Profile path: $p""; Write-Host ""Exists: $\(Test-Path $p\)""; if\(Test-Path $p\) { Get-Content $p }')
Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-Command gsd-status -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-List; Get-Command gsd-converge -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-List')

Bash(powershell -Command 'Write-Host ""PATH has gsd: $\($env:PATH -like ''*gsd*''\)""; Write-Host ""Profile loaded: $\(Test-Path Function:\\gsd-converge\)""; Write-Host ""Profile path: $\($PROFILE.CurrentUserAllHosts\)""')

Bash(powershell -Command "Write-Host ''gsd in PATH:''; $env:PATH.Split\('';''\) | Where-Object { $_ -like ''*gsd*'' }; Write-Host ''Profile exists:''; Write-Host \(Test-Path Function:\\gsd-converge\)")

Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-Command gsd-status -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \(Test-Path Function:\\gsd-status\) { Write-Host ""gsd-status FOUND as function"" } else { Write-Host ""gsd-status NOT FOUND"" }')

Bash(powershell -NoLogo -Command ". ''$USERPROFILE/Documents/WindowsPowerShell/Microsoft.PowerShell_profile.ps1''; if \(Test-Path Function:\\gsd-status\) { Write-Host ''SUCCESS: gsd-status loaded''; gsd-status } else { Write-Host ''FAIL'' }")
